# Dashboard catalog

**100 production-ready dashboards.** Generated by `dashgen` — do not edit by hand.

Each row links to the dashboard JSON, its documentation, and an annotated schematic screenshot. Import any JSON via *Dashboards → Import* and select your datasource when prompted.
